text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computers or machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. One important part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data without being explicitly programmed for every step. Another advanced type is deep learning, which uses complex networks inspired by the human brain to solve more difficult problems. Today, AI is all around us in daily life. For example, it powers virtual assistants like Siri or Alexa, recommends movies on streaming services, and helps doctors analyze medical images. As technology improves, AI will likely become even more useful in many areas.
